_comment: Fund universe config. Edit this file to add/remove/deactivate funds. Set active=false to temporarily exclude a fund without deleting it. Run process_brimi.py normally — it reads this file instead of the Excel template. Use manage_funds.py to add/remove funds from the CLI.

page_table._comment: Sections and funds shown in NEW PAGE TABLE output.
